zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Hastings於大約1117年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏伊頓 海斯廷斯時，他的父親John de Hastings32歲，母親Unknown29歲。他與Lescelina de Trailly結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1189年享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Hastings于大约1117年出生在英国英格兰波克夏伊頓 海斯廷斯时，他的父亲John de Hastings32岁，母亲Unknown29岁。他与Lescelina de Trailly结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1189年享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Hastings was born about 1117, in Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Hastings, was 32 and his mother, Unknown, was 29. He married Lescelina de Trailly. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1189, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Hastings est né environ 1117, à Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Hastings, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Unknown, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lescelina de Trailly. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1189, à l’âge de 74 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Hastings è nato il circa 1117 nel Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Hastings, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Unknown, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lescelina de Trailly. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1189, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Hastingsが約1117年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアエアトン ハスティングズで生まれた時，父John de Hastingsは32歳，母Unknownは29歳であった。Lescelina de Traillyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1189年に74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Hastings(이)가 대략 1117년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 이턴 하스틴그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Hastings(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Unknown(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Lescelina de Trailly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1189년 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Hastings родился около 1117 г. в местности эатон хастингс, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Hastings было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Unknown, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lescelina de Trailly. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1189 г. в возрасте 74 лет.
